[[Albert Hopoate (rugby league, born 2001)|Albert Hopoate]] (nephew) }} }} '''Albert Hopoate''' (born 26 June 1985 in [[North Ryde]]) is an Australian professional rugby league/union player who is currently contracted to the Penrith Emus in the NSW Shute Shield competition. He is the younger brother of controversial former international player [[John Hopoate]]. Albert attended Eaglevale High School, where he made the Australian Schoolboys Rugby Union Team. He is a member of [[the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints]].{{cite web|url=http://www.dailytelegraph.com.au/sport/nrl/young-hopoate-is-on-a-mission/story-e6frexnr-1111114623493|title=Young Hopoate is on a mission|work=The Daily Telegraph|date=2007-10-12|accessdate=2016-08-13}} He was named in the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup squads#Tonga|Tonga training squad]] for the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup]].{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/story/0,19528,12196_3935853,00.html |title=Tug-of-war over Mason |publisher=Sky Sports |date=2008-08-05 |accessdate=2008-08-06 |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20080916183620/http://www.skysports.com/story/0%2C19528%2C12196_3935853%2C00.html |archivedate=16 September 2008 |url-status=live }} Like his brother John, he is also known by the nickname 'Hoppa'. ==References== {{reflist}} ==External links== *[https://web.archive.org/web/20080722103919/http://sydneyroosters.com.au/players/player_profile.php?player_name=Albert%20Hopoate Sydney Roosters profile] *[https://web.archive.org/web/20080615155532/http://www.newtownjets.com/staff_players.php Newtown Jets profile] *[https://web.archive.org/web/20071215015754/http://www.news.com.au/dailytelegraph/story/0%2C22049%2C22571039-5001023%2C00.html Young Hopoate is on a mission] {{DEFAULTSORT:Hopoate, Albert}} [[Category:1985 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:Australian Latter Day Saints]] [[Category:Australian rugby league players]] [[Category:Hopoate family|Albert]] [[Category:Rugby league centres]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Sydney]] [[Category:Tonga national rugby league team players]] [[Category:Tongan rugby league players]] {{Australia-rugbyleague-bio-1980s-stub}} {{Tonga-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
